resources.string: All scanning functions happen locally on your device, with no internet connection required. This app is entirely open source, and the code is available for inspection on GitHub.

Effective July 17, 2026.

QR & Barcode Scanner does not collect, transmit, sell, or share personal information.

Camera frames and images selected through Android Photo Picker are processed on your device only to detect QR codes and barcodes. The app does not upload or retain camera frames or selected images.

Accepted scan results may be saved in local scan history on your device. You can clear this history at any time from the Scan History screen. The app has no Internet permission, accounts, analytics, advertising, or cloud storage.

Open and Share work only when you choose them. Android then sends the selected result to another app that you select. Those external apps operate under their own privacy policies.

Removing the app also removes its locally stored history.
Camera permission is required to scan QR codes and barcodes. Scanning happens locally on your device.
Point your camera at a QR code or barcode.
Camera permission is needed before scanning.
Error: camera could not start on this device.
No QR code or barcode scanned yet.
No app found to open this link.
Tap a saved result to preview it again.
